"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 1: ...ses_handled, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.create...

HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_cases_handled, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02' AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM casehistory__c h
    WHERE h.caseid__c = c.id AND h.field__c = 'Owner' AND h.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_cases_handled, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02' AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM casehistory__c h
    WHERE h.caseid__c = c.id AND h.field__c = 'Owner' AND h.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02' AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM casehistory__c h
    WHERE h.caseid__c = c.id AND h.field__c = 'Owner' AND h.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case" c
WHERE (c.createddate::timestamp) >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND (c.createddate::timestamp) < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM casehistory__c h
    WHERE h.caseid__c = c.id AND h.field__c = 'Owner' AND h.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case" c
WHERE (c.createddate::timestamp) >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '4 months')
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM casehistory__c h
    WHERE h.caseid__c = c.id AND h.field__c = 'Owner' AND h.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM casehistory__c h
    WHERE h.caseid__c = c.id AND h.field__c = 'Owner' AND h.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
